steps.title: Order the seven percentages
steps.content: The seven table values in increasing order are $19.5\%$, $21.9\%$, $25.9\%$, $27.9\%$, $30.1\%$, $35.5\%$, and $36.4\%$.

steps.title: Find the middle value
steps.content: With $7$ values, the median is the fourth value in the ordered list. The median for the seven states is $27.9\%$.
